name: GitHub Pull Requests
description: Shows up to 5 of your open GitHub pull requests inline under the session list (via the gh CLI — the PRs you opened across all your repos, including org repos, or a single repo over HTTP), plus a dialog listing them in a searchable, sortable grid with an "Assigned to me" filter; click one to drop a prompt asking the agent to review it. The prompt template is editable in settings.
author: Cockpit
